description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a low boundary wall. The front facade features large windows and a main entrance, with a landscaped area containing small trees and shrubs. The rear and side yards are partially landscaped, with additional greenery and open space. The building's exterior is predominantly smooth and light-colored, with minimal ornamentation and clean lines. The windows are arranged in a linear pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large front windows, and landscaped yards enclosed by a low wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and landscaped area with shrubs and trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat roof, boundary wall, and a small landscaped section with trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and a row of shrubs along the boundary.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the side yard, trees, and the flat roof extending over the structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
